sentences.arabic: غَسْلُ الْيَدَيْنِ بِالْمَاءِ وَالصَّابُونِ عَادَةٌ أَسَاسِيَّةٌ لِلْوِقَايَةِ مِنَ الْجَرَاثِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Pranje ruku sapunom i vodom je osnovna navika za prevenciju klica.
sentences.translationEn: Washing hands with soap and water is a basic habit for preventing germs.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَغْسِلَ أَيْدِيَنَا قَبْلَ الطَّعَامِ وَبَعْدَ الْعَوْدَةِ إِلَى الْمَنْزِلِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo prati ruke prije jela i nakon povratka kući.
sentences.translationEn: We must wash our hands before eating and after returning home.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ الْبَسِيطَةُ تَحْفَظُ الْعَائِلَةَ كُلَّهَا مِنَ الْعَدْوَى.
sentences.translation: Ova jednostavna navika čuva cijelu porodicu od infekcija.
sentences.translationEn: This simple habit keeps the whole family safe from infections.
